title: Great Britain BESS Fleet Data-Integrity Screening and Pillswood Grid-Dispatch Capacity Audit
description: Level 1 data integrity and Level 2 physics compliance screening for the Great Britain BESS fleet, and a deep-dive 12-month grid-dispatch capacity audit for Pillswood BESS (E_PILLB-1 & E_PILLB-2) under the VolMax P10 Verification Protocol. The audit uses 30-minute metered volumes from Elexon B1610 telemetry to evaluate active power capacity (98 MW claim) and energy capacity (196 MWh claim) split across a pre-registered unseen window (July 2025 - May 2026) and a scoped window (June 2026).
notes: Final verdicts for UK-HARMONY-001 (Pillswood BESS): Active Power Capacity (98 MW): Verified with Limitations (Bounded); Energy Storage Capacity (196 MWh): Verified with Limitations (Bounded). Rules pre-registered in commit d6458e53995f32d3989c98ef2e3cf3426e2e5052.
